chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-221 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1043/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 08.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yaseen Khaskheli, advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Gulzar Malano, APG along with SI / I.O Rabnawaz of P.S. Setharja, District Khairpur ***************** In compliance of order dated 18.03.2025, a statement has been filed by SI/ I.O Rabnawaz of P.S. Setharja annexing a letter dated 20.03.2025, issued by medical board constituted for determination of her age, who after her examination, has opined that petitioner Rukhsana is aged about 16 years. In view of such statement, I.O present submits that he will submit final report under Section 173 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate. In such circumstances, instant petition stands disposed of, with direction to Investigating Officer to submit such report within a week before concerned Magistrate, where parties may agitate their grievances. This petition is disposed of accordingly, however, official Respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law by providing protection to the petitioners. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
